SR_ELGBL_FOR_NVGTN_IND 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Eligibility for Navigation, Includes Track 1 Control Group Benes 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Beneficiary eligible for navigation, includes track 1 control group beneficiaries.
